betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Endgame Armors§f

§aThe pinnacle of NTM protection.§f

§6Schrabidium Armor§f: 10 defense, 3.0 RR. Haste III, Strength III, Jump Boost II, Speed III. Hard cap 4, damage mod 0.1. Fireproof. Requires Starmetal base + Ionized Particles.

§6CMB Steel Armor§f: 10 defense, 1.29 RR. Speed III, Haste III, Strength. Hard cap 2, damage mod 0.05. Fireproof. Best all-around — easier to craft than Schrabidium.

§6Dineutronium Armor§f: 2 defense, 5.0 damage mod. Makes you take MORE damage. Pure meme armor. 

§eTip§f: Schrabidium and CMB are the two practical endgame sets. CMB is more accessible; Schrabidium has better RR. DNT is for flexing only.
